summary: Iteration 19 frontend-only validation. All 5 flows passed on first try with no fixes needed: FIX 1 (notify_email validation invalid + valid), FIX 2 (WhatsApp delete number — confirm prompt on seed 'Ventas GDL' cancelled, then created 'Test Borrar' and deleted it successfully), and full Packages CRUD (CREATE E2E-TEST-1 with season/hotel/includes/excludes/day -> EDIT nights 5→7 verified in card -> DELETE card removed). Test data cleaned up (no residual E2E-TEST-1 package nor Test Borrar number). Seed 'Ventas GDL' preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx: notify_email regex client-side mirrors backend EMAIL_RE — OK. Consider also trimming and rejecting whitespace-only consistently (currently uses .trim() in the test which is fine).
WhatsAppInbox.jsx removeNumber uses window.confirm — acceptable for admin destructive action; consider replacing with a styled confirm modal for UX consistency with Stripe/Gmail dialogs.
PackageEditor.jsx StringList uses index-based key (key={i}) which is fine for static order but can cause subtle focus issues when reordering; not a bug for current flows.
Packages.jsx 'Desde' price uses Math.min on Infinity fallback — if a package has all-zero/empty prices the card displays 'Desde $Infinity'. Suggest guarding with isFinite() before rendering.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted: WhatsApp number 'Test Borrar'; Package 'E2E-TEST-1'. Final state clean. Seed 'Ventas GDL' preserved (confirm dismissed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iter-19 fixes verified green via UI playwright. Backend was self-tested by main agent via curl (per agent_to_agent_context_note). Baileys microservice is not deployed in preview, so connect/QR/send WhatsApp flows would return 503/502 — expected; not retested here. notify_email persisted as 'reservas@aventurateporjalisco.com' (was unchanged from previous valid state). Next iteration can focus on remaining roadmap items.
